{{CargoOrgan
|name=Active Enzyme
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10931
|idx=31
|description="We discovered an active enzyme that significantly increases cellular activity and accelerates cell regeneration when the tissues are damaged."
—Parasol Research Log
|skill=
|hp=1200
|def=95
|atk=97
|rush=84
|gene1=In explorations, 2x Food Drops +2%
|gene2=In Zombie Form, HP Regen +400 per round
|gene3=In Snail Arena, CRIT DMG REDUC +5%
|gene7=In Snail Arena, CRIT DMG REDUC +5% (Awakened)
|}}
